name: Sausage and Spinach Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds ricotta cheese, part skim milk
1 1/2 pounds mozzarella cheese, part skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Italian sausage in a skillet and drain excess fat, then set aside.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the ricotta cheese, cooked spinach, beaten egg, sugar, and nutmeg until smooth.
3. Pour 1 cup of spaghetti sauce into the bottom of a baking dish.
4. Cover with a layer of cooked lasagna noodles.
5. Spread a layer of the ricotta mixture over the noodles.
6. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top.
7. Add another layer of Italian sausage.
8. Finish with a layer of remaining spaghetti sauce and grated parmesan cheese.
9. Bake in a moderate oven for 35 minutes, or until heated through and the cheese is golden brown.
